---
title: "cyclistic_analysis"
output: html_document
---

# ==============================
# Cyclistic Bike Share Analysis
# ==============================

# Load libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)

# ------------------------------
# Import Data
# ------------------------------
files <- list.files("C:/Users/Wojtas/Desktop/divvy_data", full.names = TRUE)
data_list <- lapply(files, read_csv)
all_data <- bind_rows(data_list)

# ------------------------------
# Data Cleaning
# ------------------------------
all_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(
    started_at = ymd_hms(started_at),
    ended_at = ymd_hms(ended_at),
    ride_length = ended_at - started_at,
    day_of_week = wday(started_at, label = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(ride_length > 0)

# Convert ride_length to numeric
all_data <- all_data %>%
  mutate(ride_length = as.numeric(ride_length))

# ------------------------------
# Analysis
# ------------------------------

# Average ride length
all_data %>%
  group_by(member_casual) %>%
  summarise(avg_ride = mean(ride_length))

# Rides by day
all_data %>%
  group_by(member_casual, day_of_week) %>%
  summarise(total_rides = n())

# ------------------------------
# Visualization
# ------------------------------
ggplot(all_data, aes(x = day_of_week, fill = member_casual)) +
  geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
  labs(title = "Rides by Day and User Type")
